name: Bergin Hunt and Fish Club
description: The Bergin Hunt and Fish Club was a former hangout of the Gambino crime family in Queens, New York. Despite its name, it was not a legitimate hunting or fishing club but a front for criminal activities such as truck hijacking and loansharking. The club consisted of two connected brick-front stores located at 98-04 101st Avenue in Ozone Park, Queens.

sources.title: Bergin Hunt and Fish Club — Wikipedia
